identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Design a high-end, production-quality SaaS/Analytics hybrid website for Indian Telecom Sector analysis.
identity.tone: Authoritative, Transformative, Precise, High-Tech but Grounded
identity.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with The Performance Pro

theme.strategy: Dark mode for data-heavy sections (Hero, Dashboard, Real-Time). Light mode for content-heavy sections (Transformation, Comparison, Insights).
theme.visual_language: Tactical Minimalism. Sharp edges, high contrast, glassmorphism for navigation.

rules: Do NOT use Inter for Headings.
Use tight tracking for large headings.
Use wide tracking for small uppercase labels.

tracing_beam.description: Vertical line timeline for Pre vs Post 2016.
tracing_beam.implementation: Absolute positioned div with gradient background, animating height on scroll.

glassmorphism.nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-border/40 sticky top-0 z-50

elements: Subheadline: 'Visualizing the Disruption of India's Telecom Sector'

charts.style: Minimalist, thin lines, dot markers only on hover. Use custom tooltips.

logos.note: Use text-based logos or clearbit API if available. Fallback to clean typography.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT apply universal transition: all.
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
